entry.title: Watch the teaser trailer for 'Blade Runner 2099,' a new sci-fi series coming to Prime Video November 25
entry.summary: The limited series starring Michelle Yeoh and Hunter Schafer is set 50 years after 'Blade Runner 2049'.

entry.title: What you need to know about Amazon today: July 24, 2026
entry.summary: Here are the latest headlines from Amazon News.

entry.title: Claude Opus 5 now available on AWS
entry.summary: Anthropic's most advanced Opus model delivers top-tier intelligence for agentic coding and knowledge work—now available on Amazon Bedrock and Claude Platform on AWS.

entry.title: 50+ things to try with Alexa+
entry.summary: Alexa+ is our next-generation AI assistant that gets things done—it solves daily problems, keeps you entertained, helps you stay connected, and can converse about virtually any topic.

entry.title: Watch the teaser trailer for ‘The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power’ Season 3, premiering November 11
entry.summary: Prime Video’s epic saga set in J.R.R. Tolkien's Middle-earth will be back for a third season.

entry.title: How to watch 'Batman: Caped Crusader' Season 2, coming to Prime Video July 31
entry.summary: The critically acclaimed animated series returns to Prime Video, with the arrival of fan-favorite Gotham City residents including Edward Nygma, Carrie Kelly, and The Joker.

entry.title: Company news
entry.summary: News and information about Amazon, Inc.

entry.title: Entertainment
entry.summary: Stories about the latest apps and games, movies, TV shows, and music available from Amazon Prime Video, Amazon Music, and Kindle.

entry.title: AWS
entry.summary: If you're an inventor, you'll love being an Amazonian. From day one at Amazon, you'll take ownership of projects that have a direct impact on our customers.

entry.title: Devices
entry.summary: Stories and information about Amazon devices, such as Kindle e-readers, Fire tablets, Fire TV streaming media players, Echo devices, Dash Buttons, and more.

entry.title: Community
entry.summary: We look for uniquely Amazonian and innovative ways to make positive, lasting impacts and encourage our employees to champion causes they care about.

entry.title: Retail
entry.summary: More information about shopping on Amazon and our selection of products and services.
